what_it_does: A self-contained design-system preview card demonstrating the gold-circle entity badge: any CV-library icon wrapped in a thin gold ring, shown in outline, filled, and a desaturated state-strength gradient, generated by an inline circleIcon() JS function.
observations: Carries the @dsCard metadata comment (group Brand, name 'Icon — gold-circle badges', viewport 700x320).
Loads ../assets/icons/cv-icons.js and builds three rows of badges via script.
circleIcon(name,size,opts) computes inner-icon size (0.56x), ring width (max 1.5 or size*0.05), fill (gold when filled), and opacity from a desaturated value (1 - desaturated).
Uses --accent-gold for ring/fill and --fg-primary for the filled-icon glyph colour.
Row1: outline badges for 7 entities (User/File/Listing/Hub/Pricing/Vi/Event); Row2: filled variant for 5; Row3: house icon at desaturation 0/0.2/0.4/0.6/0.8 labelled by percentage.
Lead text shows the intended JSX usage: <CvIcon name="house" circle /> / circle filled / desaturated={0…0.85}.
Maps named entity types (Listing→browser-house, Hub→vr-headset, Vi→network) to specific icons.
standouts: Documents a React component API (CvIcon with circle/filled/desaturated props) the preview emulates in plain JS.
The desaturation/state-strength gradient encodes active-vs-inactive entity state as opacity.
conventions: Follows token references (--accent-gold, --fg-primary) and reuses the shared CV icon library.
Builds badges parametrically (size-derived ring/inner dimensions) rather than fixed values.
Entity-to-icon naming is an explicit semantic mapping.
notes: Gold-circle entity-badge preview: wraps CV icons in a gold ring (outline/filled/desaturated) for diagram-level entity use, with a parametric size-derived JS builder mirroring a CvIcon JSX API.
questions: Is the CvIcon React component (with circle/filled/desaturated props) implemented elsewhere, or is this preview ahead of it?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — declares a gold-circle badges preview and renders the outline/filled/desaturated variants with usage docs.
intention_signals: To establish a reusable entity-badge primitive (icon-in-gold-ring) usable at diagram scale, with fill and desaturation encoding active/inactive entity state, and to specify its CvIcon prop API.
novelty: Treating icons as addressable entity badges with a continuous desaturation state-strength axis and a size-derived ring/inner geometry formula.
contribution: Contributes the gold-circle entity-badge primitive, its parametric geometry formula, its outline/filled/desaturated variants, and the entity→icon semantic mapping plus the CvIcon prop API.
summary_for_embedding: A token-driven HTML preview card demonstrating gold-circle entity badges (CV icons in a gold ring) in outline, filled, and desaturated state-strength variants via a parametric JS builder.
intention_for_embedding: To present and document the design system's gold-circle entity-badge primitive and its CvIcon API for diagram-level entity representation.
